description: As an administrator (username: admin, password: Admin1234!), configure a quiz in the "Introduction to Biology" (BIO101) course at http://localhost/moodle. The quiz, named "Midterm Exam: Cell Biology", requires the description "This exam covers topics from the cell biology unit including organelles, cell processes, and cellular structures.", a 60-minute time limit, and 1 allowed attempt. The quiz must include two multiple-choice questions: "Powerhouse of the Cell" (Question: "Which organelle is known as the powerhouse of the cell?"; Choices: Nucleus, Mitochondria [100%], Ribosome, Golgi apparatus; Default mark: 1) and "Basic Unit of Life" (Question: "What is the basic unit of life?"; Choices: Atom, Molecule, Cell [100%], Organ; Default mark: 1).
